---
title: Further Reading
bibliography: references.bib
---


- Robotics, Vision and Control: Fundamental Algorithms in Python by Peter Corke [@Corke.2023]. Available for free through HVL library.
- Lean Robotics: A Guide to Making Robots Work in Your Factory by Samuel Bouchard [@Bouchard.2017]. Available for free [here](https://blog.robotiq.com/hubfs/Leanroboticsbook.pdf).
